userErrors.message: Currency codes in the marketing engagement input do not match.
Marketing activity currency code does not match the currency code in the marketing engagement input.
Marketing activity currency code does not match the currency code in the marketing engagement input.
The channel handle is not recognized. Please contact your partner manager for more information.

notes: Captured currency validation against a disposable external marketing activity with a USD budget and cleaned it up afterward.
Activity currency mismatch is captured through both marketingActivityId and remoteId resolution paths.

The unrecognized channelHandle probe returns INVALID_CHANNEL_HANDLE before currency validation; recognized channel-handle currency validation remains runtime-test-backed until the disposable shop exposes a valid handle.
